programme.title: True Grit, (2010, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: True Grit is a powerful story of vengeance and valor set in an unforgiving and unpredictable frontier where justice is simple and mercy is rare.

programme.title: Hondo, (1953, Western)
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Hondo Lane, a cavalry rider who becomes the protector of Angie Lowe as well as a father figure to her boy, Johnny. Angie, determinedly awaiting the return of her husband, refuses to leave their homestead despite the growing danger.

programme.title: Rio Grande, (1950, Western)
programme.desc: Lt. Col. Yorke leads his cavalry troops to the Rio Grande to fight a warring tribe. Yorke’s toughest battle lies ahead when his unorthodox plan to outwit the elusive Apaches leads to possible court-martial.

programme.title: The Alamo, (1960, War)
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Big Jake, (1971, Action)
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: Hondo, (1953, Western)
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Hondo Lane, a cavalry rider who becomes the protector of Angie Lowe as well as a father figure to her boy, Johnny. Angie, determinedly awaiting the return of her husband, refuses to leave their homestead despite the growing danger.

programme.title: Rio Grande, (1950, Western)
programme.desc: Lt. Col. Yorke leads his cavalry troops to the Rio Grande to fight a warring tribe. Yorke’s toughest battle lies ahead when his unorthodox plan to outwit the elusive Apaches leads to possible court-martial.

programme.title: McLintock!, (1963, Western)
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: Big Jake, (1971, Action)
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: Bumblebee, (2018, Science fiction)
programme.desc: On a mission to protect Earth, the battle-scarred and broken Bumblebee is found and repaired by a teenager named Charlie. They must work together to save the planet from the evil Decepticons in this action-packed adventure for the whole family.

programme.title: Cloverfield, (2007, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: Love and Monsters, (2020, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In a monster-infested world, Joel (Dylan O'Brien) learns his high school sweetheart (Jessica Henwick) is just 80 miles away. Now, Joel must discover his inner hero, facing unknown dangers on the impossible journey to be with the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Push, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: The Spiderwick Chronicles, (2007, Children)
programme.desc: From the best-selling series of books comes a fantasy adventure, revealing the unseen world that exists all around us.

programme.title: A-X-L, (2018, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A.X.L. is a top-secret, robotic dog created by the military to help protect tomorrow's soldiers. Code named by the scientists who created him, A.X.L. stands for Attack, Exploration, Logistics, and embodies next-generation artificial intelligence.

programme.desc: From the best-selling series of books comes a fantasy adventure, revealing the unseen world that exists all around us.

programme.desc: Depp stars in the title role as a man unjustly sent to prison who vows revenge, not only for his punishment, but for the devastating consequences that happened to his wife and daughter.

programme.title: Point Break, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: An F.B.I. Agent goes undercover to catch a gang of surfers who may be bank robbers.

programme.title: Jay and Silent Bob Strike Back, (2001, Comedy)
programme.desc: The comic "Bluntman and Chronic" is adapted for the big-screen by Hollywood without the permission of the real-life stoner icons of CLERKS— Jay and Silent Bob.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 3: Hangman's Daughter, (1999, Horror)
programme.desc: Set in Mexico in the early 1900s, this prequel to the From Dusk Till Dawn series finds outlaw Johnny Madrid on the run from the hangman, with the hangman's daughter Esmeralda by his side. Together they are faced with the fight of their lives.

programme.title: Up in Smoke, (1978, Comedy)

programme.title: Cheech & Chong's Still Smokin, (1983, Comedy)
programme.desc: It's Cheech and Chong at their wildest, craziest, most medicated, doing all those zonked-out characters and hilarious routines that put them where they are today: out of the country.

programme.title: Cheech & Chong's The Corsican Brothers, (1984, Comedy)
programme.desc: A whacked-out Comedy about a pair of irreverent brothers who battle a dastardly baron.

programme.title: Road House, (1989, Action)
programme.desc: Patrick Swayze stars with Kelly Lynch, Sam Elliott and Ben Gazzara in this classic, action-filled tale of a cool but tough bouncer -- with a degree in philosophy -- at a Midwestern roadhouse who goes head to head with an insidious mob boss.

programme.title: Up in Smoke, (1978, Comedy)
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early 1970s.

programme.title: Cheech & Chong's Still Smokin, (1983, Comedy)
programme.desc: It's Cheech and Chong at their wildest, craziest, most medicated, doing all those zonked-out characters and hilarious routines that put them where they are today: out of the country.

programme.title: Yellowbeard, (1983, Comedy)
programme.desc: A 17th-century pirate in search of treasure. He's accompanied by his son, who has the location of the treasure tattooed on his head. It is a parody on the pirate movies of earlier days.

programme.title: Labyrinth, (1986, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure, (1989, Comedy)
programme.desc: Our non-heinous heroes Bill (Alex Winter) and Ted (Keanu Reeves) are in danger of flunking history! But when the righteous Rufus (George Carlin) arrives in a time-travelling phone booth, the dense dudes discover their destiny!

programme.title: Evil Dead, (2013, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: Five friends have found the mysterious and fiercely powerful Book of the Dead, which releases a violent demon on a bloodthirsty quest to possess them all.

programme.title: Scouts Guide To The Zombie Apocalypse, (2015, Zombies)
programme.desc: When their peaceful town is ravaged by a zombie invasion, three scouts and one badass cocktail waitress will fight for the badge of a lifetime and put their scouting skills to the test to save mankind from the undead.

programme.title: The Final Girls, (2015, Slashers and Serial Killers)
programme.desc: A young woman grieving the loss of her mother, a famous scream queen from the 1980s, finds herself pulled into the world of her mom's most famous movie. Reunited, the women must fight off the film's maniacal killer.

programme.title: Quarantine 2: Terminal, (2011, Action)
programme.desc: Earlier tonight, a bizarre disease was unleashed in a run-down Los Angeles tenement... and no one got out alive. Yet something escaped. Now, aboard Flight 318, the first symptoms begin to show. Rating: R

programme.title: Crawl, (2019, Creature Features)
programme.desc: As a hurricane tears through Florida, Haley rushes to find her father, who is injured and trapped in the crawl space of their home. With the storm intensifying and water levels rising, the pair face an even bigger threat lurking below the surface.

programme.title: The Possession of Hannah Grace, (2018, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: Following a failed Exorcism Megan Reed (Shay Mitchell) is working overnight at the morgue when she takes delivery of a disfigured cadaver. Soon Megan begins to experience horrifying visions and starts to suspect that the body may be possessed by a demon.

programme.title: The Woman in Black, (2012, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: Author Kipps (Daniel Radcliffe), a widowed lawyer, is sent to a remote village to sort out the affairs of a recently deceased eccentric. But upon his arrival, it soon becomes clear that everyone in the own is keeping a deadly secret.

programme.title: Hush, (2016, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: A deaf and mute writer who retreated into the woods to live a solitary life must fight for her life in silence when a masked killer appears at her window.

programme.title: Carrie, (2013, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: Chloë Grace Moretz and Julianne Moore star in this exhilarating reimagining of Stephen King's iconic best-seller, 'Carrie.' After merciless taunting and abuse, events spiral out of control until the terrifying conclusion of this horror story.

programme.title: 48 Hrs., (1982, Action)
programme.desc: Nolte is a roughedged cop after two vicious cop-killers. He can't do it without the help of smooth Murphy, who is serving time for a half-million dollar robbery.

programme.title: Another 48 Hrs., (1989, Action)
programme.desc: Times may change…but these guys don’t! Eddie Murphy and Nick Nolte are back on the streets in this smash sequel.

programme.title: Major League, (1989, Comedy)
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians threatens to move the team unless they deliver immediate results. She then fills the roster with has-beens to guarantee their failure. But the team miraculously rallies together and starts to win.

programme.title: The Kurosuki gang captures Rokusuke, and Raiga tells him that he will hold a funeral for him!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Raiga and Ranmaru use their Hidden Mist Jutsu to conceal themselves in Katabami Gold Mine, where even Neji’s Byakugan cannot detect them.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: The Kurosuki Family is dispersed, and peace returns to Katabami Gold Mine.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Raiga comes back to life, only to see Ranmaru lying deathly still on the ground.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Despite his injuries, Lee keeps on fighting desperately. But the tornado that envelopes Raiga’s attack takes the form of a dragon, and Lee is swallowed up by it.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto is chosen to lead Konohamaru, Moegi and Udon in a survival training exercise. Their destination is the Stone Face of Warudakumi at the top of Mt. Takurami…
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Tsunade orders Naruto, Hinata, Kiba and Akamaru on a mission to capture the thief Gosunkugi.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto and the others tend to an injured Sazanami. As Sazanami tells it, he had once been a swordsmith in a peaceful town and was framed for a murder committed by Gosunkugi.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: While Guy and Lee are away, two impostors dressed like them sneak into Hidden Leaf Village.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: The Land of Birds is in turmoil due to a specter known as the Cursed Warrior, which is believed to be the ghost of Lord Owashi, the previous feudal lord who died suddenly.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Moso, the late feudal lord’s counselor, and Komei, the chief strategist, are at odds with each other. Neji begins to think that the Cursed Warrior is part of a plot…
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Komei is controlling the Cursed Warrior. Moso thwarts Komei's ambitions. The Leaf team feels uneasy about his motives. Neji doesn't want to get involved, but Naruto is defiant. Gamakichi and Gamatatsu are summoned to investigate…
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Tenten and Neji have no choice but to listen to Kakashi. He senses that their being followed. Komei has been declared a criminal and is to be executed. The Cursed Warrior appears and snatches Komei away.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Sagi swears to punish Moso himself. Naruto is reminded of Sasuke when he sees Sagi. Neither words nor Naruto's attempts to stop him can deter Sagi from his chosen path of revenge.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: At Moso's mansion, a battle takes place between the Wandering Ninja and a Leaf Ninja. With Chishima's help, Naruto is freed from Moso's genjutsu. Moso then reveals his true form as the leader of the Wandering ninja, Hoki!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Choji and Naruto are craving Ichiraku's special ramen only to find out that they find the shop closed! Teuchi reveals that his daughter has been kidnapped by Ryonin, aka the Ninja Chefs, who is after his secret recipes!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: The Demon of the Ocean is wreaking havoc in the Land of the Sea. Anko leads a team consisting of Naruto, Ino, and Shino. It turns out Anko has an unexpected history with the Land of the Sea.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Unable to find Naruto, Anko meets with officials from the Land of the Sea. The ship carrying government funds that they were supposed to guard sets sail the next day!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: As soon as she awakens, Anko begins to remember Demon Island, a place once visited with her former sensei, Orochimaru. Anko reveals the truth behind the disappearances and the secret behind Isaribi's body.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Amachi and his gang begin their attack on the government ship. Naruto and the others escape from Demon Island, but the sight that greets them is the Land of the Sea fleet on the verge of annihilation.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: The Hidden Leaf ninja and Amachi battle it out at sea. With Naruto's help, Amachi is defeated, but then a monster appears. Naruto summons Gamabunta in order to defeat the monster.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Kunijiro visits Tsunade and decides to have Naruto guide his boy through one day in the life of a ninja!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto, Kiba, and Hinata are searching for buried treasure at the request of Tsunade's friend Agari Kaisen. Thinking its an easy task since they have a map, Tsunade threatens to send them back to the Academy if they fail.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: After escaping from the cave, Naruto and the others chase after the Kedouin in order to put a halt to their plot, but the Village Hidden in the Leaves is already under attack.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto discovers Jiraiya is up to no good. Jiraiya claims to be busy getting his manuscript ready before his deadline. Impatient and irritated, Naruto writes his own manuscript for Jiraiya!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Hidden Leaf Village receives a request from the Village Hidden in the Stars to guard a star. The star is actually a meteorite that fell 200 years ago and is said to possess mysterious powers.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto and the others investigate the whereabouts of the stolen star. The team suspects that is an inside job because the ninja who took the star used the ninja art, Kujaku, from the Star Village.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Akahoshi, the masked ninja who kidnapped Sumaru, intends to use Sumaru to call out the mysterious ninja who stole the star.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: The masked ninja and Naruto fall into the depths of the Valley. While tending to Naruto's wounds, the masked ninja tells him the reason for stealing the star.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Natsuhi's body is reacting to the effects of the star. She wields the star and desperately confronts Akahoshi, but Sumaru is taken as hostage
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Sumaru senses his mother's death and Naruto is unable to stop an angry Sumaru from running off. To save Sumaru, Hokuto and Mizura stake their lives to reveal the truth behind the star training.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Akamaru is injured by a rival shinobi from another nation. The shinobi used a battle skill that spreads bacteria throughout the opponent's body, infecting the victim's mental faculties. This causes Akamaru to go into uncontrollable rampage!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: A mysterious being attaches itself to Naruto, while he was training in the forest. Tsunade begins to wonder if it isn't the legendary being known as the "Onbaa."
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Frank Miller's Sin City, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: In these intertwined tales, a universe of unlikely and reluctant heroes try to do the right thing in a city that refuses to care.

programme.title: Sin City: A Dame To Kill For, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: Some of Sin City's most hard-boiled citizens cross paths with a few of its more reviled inhabitants.

programme.title: The Spirit, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: In the vein of BATMAN BEGINS and SIN CITY, THE SPIRIT takes us on a sinister, gut-wrenching ride with a hero who is born, murdered and born again.

programme.title: Frank Miller's Sin City, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: In these intertwined tales, a universe of unlikely and reluctant heroes try to do the right thing in a city that refuses to care.

programme.title: The Way Of The Gun, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: A pair of bumbling criminals kidnap a woman for ransom money, but they soon realize they've made a huge mistake when they learn she is a surrogate for a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: 8 Heads in a Duffel Bag, (1997, Thriller)
programme.desc: All gangster Tommy Spinelli wants to do is deliver his carry-on duffel bag to his boss. Unfortunately, the bag is switched with a Mexican-bound medical student...who has no idea that the bag contains the severed heads of eight Los Angeles gangsters!

programme.title: State Property, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: Beans decides that the only way to grasp the American Dream is to take it. STATE PROPERTY follows Beans and his crew, as they take over the city creating mayhem as their empire builds.

programme.title: City of God, (2002, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: This critically acclaimed global hit film is a true story of crime and redemption set in one of the most notorious slums: Rio de Janeiro's "City of God."

programme.title: City Of Men, (2007, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Two friends (Douglas Silva, Darlan Cunha) land on opposing sides of a gang war in the slums of Rio de Janeiro.

programme.title: Elite Squad, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Inspired by true events of the Batalhão de Operações Policiais Especiais (BOPE), the Special Police Operations Battalion of the Rio de Janeiro Military Police.

programme.title: The Killer [English Subtitled], (1989, Action)
programme.desc: A disillusioned assassin accepts one last hit in hopes of using his earnings to restore vision to a singer he accidentally blinded.

programme.title: Hard Boiled [English Subtitled], (1992, Action)
programme.desc: A tough-as-nails cop teams up with an undercover agent to shut down a sinister mobster and his crew.

programme.title: Brotherhood of the Wolf, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: In 18th-century France, the Chevalier de Fronsac and his Native American friend Mani are sent to the Gevaudan province at the king's behest to investigate the killings of hundreds by a mysterious beast.

programme.title: Elite Squad, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Inspired by true events of the Batalhão de Operações Policiais Especiais (BOPE), the Special Police Operations Battalion of the Rio de Janeiro Military Police.

programme.desc: A group of small-town high school students discovers their teachers are under the control of mind-controlling alien parasites. From a smart script by Kevin Williamson (SCREAM), and directed by action-expert Robert Rodriguez (FROM DUSK TO DAWN).

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn, (1996, Horror)
programme.desc: In this thrilling cult classic, two dangerous outlaw brothers head out on a wild crime spree. After kidnapping a father and his two kids, the bad guys head to a seedy Mexican bar for safety but come face to face with blood-sucking vampires.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 2: Texas Blood Money, (1999, Horror)
programme.desc: When a gang of bank robbers makes a run for the border, they wander into the wrong bar and mess with the wrong vampires. It's kill-or-be-killed in the ultimate battle to stop these evil creatures and save their own lives!

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 3: Hangman's Daughter, (1999, Horror)
programme.desc: Set in Mexico in the early 1900s, this prequel to the From Dusk Till Dawn series finds outlaw Johnny Madrid on the run from the hangman, with the hangman's daughter Esmeralda by his side. Together they are faced with the fight of their lives.

programme.desc: The FBI sends a loner (Charles Bronson) to kidnap a mobster's mistress in Switzerland.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Duel in Ruins: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma is put to the ultimate test when a Number Guardian traps his friends and forces him to battle for their freedom!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Dark Mist Rises: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma searches for the second Mythyrian Number and ends up finding an old nemesis who is out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Dark Mist Rises: Part 2
programme.desc: Every time Astral attacks, he puts Yuma’s life in danger, but if he doesn’t attack, he’s a goner himself! It’s a no-win situation in the cruelest duel yet!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Barian Vengeance: Part 1
programme.desc: Alito’s back in the ring to take down Yuma, but a fair fight isn’t in the cards when Alito has one of Yuma’s friends in his corner!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Barian Vengeance: Part 2
programme.desc: Nistro’s under Alito’s control, and it’s up to Yuma and Dextra to free him! Can this tag team duo bob and weave their way past Alito’s attacks, or will this Barian knock out any chances they have of winning?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Put to the Test: Part 1
programme.desc: The hunt for the Mythyrian Numbers leads our heroes to the peak of a perilous mountain where Kite’s skills are put to the test by a dragon-wielding Number Guardian!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Put to the Test: Part 2
programme.desc: Kite faces his toughest challenge ever when a powerful Number Guardian threatens to take possession of his Galaxy-Eyes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Furry Fury
programme.desc: After an ancient statue is unearthed, Yuma finds himself between a rock and a furry place when he discovers that there’s more to Girag than meets the eye – like a red nose and whiskers!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Sea of Troubles: Part 1
programme.desc: It’s rough waters ahead for Yuma and his friends when the search for the last two Mythyrian Numbers leads them to an ancient ruin that lies beneath the bottom of the ocean!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Sea of Troubles: Part 2
programme.desc: The battle beneath the ocean reaches new depths of danger when Shark comes face to face with the Number Guardian, Abyss!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A World of Chaos: Part 1
programme.desc: Earth and Astral World are under attack! Yuma and Astral are the only ones who can stop it, but saving their planets may come at the ultimate price…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A World of Chaos: Part 2
programme.desc: The battle between our two heroes and Number 96 comes to a shocking conclusion that leaves only one person standing!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Memory Thief: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone’s stealing memories, and the Super Secret Numbers Club are going to find out who! But when the hunters become the hunted, Yuma’s friends quickly realize that they need help from an exterminator!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Memory Thief: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma and Trey team up to take down a bugged out Barian who likes to munch on memories! Can Yuma and Trey swat down this winged menace before he swoops in to drain their brains?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Tentacles of Terror: Part 1
programme.desc: With Vector’s patience for failure fading fast, Mr. Heartland begs for a final chance to beat Yuma! Desperate to deliver, Heartland deploys his most dangerous duelist to date, a treacherous Barian armed with toxic tentacles!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Tentacles of Terror: Part 2
programme.desc: Shark and Quattro struggle to keep their heads above water as they battle the Barian duelist from the deep, Chironex!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Now or Never: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma’s all set to travel across the stars to save Astral, but an unexpected pest pops by to plunder Yuma’s plans!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Now or Never: Part 2
programme.desc: Kite and Quinton team up to swat down the bug-eyed Barian Scritch! But when Kite starts hallucinating, Quinton must fend off their flying foe while simultaneously steering clear of his confused partner’s attacks!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Mission: Astral World: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma’s mission to find Astral turns into a high-stakes race against time when Yuma learns the Guardian of Astral World plans to erase his best friend from existence!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Mission: Astral World: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma faces his toughest challenge yet when he battles against an opponent who can draw the exact card he needs every turn!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Mission: Astral World: Part 3
programme.desc: Yuma fights to free his best friend Astral in a duel he cannot win but must not lose! Meanwhile, Shark comes face-to-face with his past and learns the truth about his Barian background!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Mission: Astral World: Part 4
programme.desc: With Astral’s fate hanging in the balance, the heart-pounding battle between Yuma and Astral World’s Guardian thunders to its frenzied finish!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Assimilation: Part 1
programme.desc: To get a lead on Yuma and his buddies, Vector bombards Earth with bogus Numbers. When one of them takes the bait, it puts Mr. Heartland and his sinister swarm of insect monsters hot on the gang’s heels!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Assimilation: Part 2
programme.desc: With Kite grounded, Yuma and Astral step up to take the buzzing Barian, Mr. Heartland down! Can our heroes repel this pest, or will they end up getting squashed instead?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Battle with the Barians
programme.desc: When all seven Barian Emperors ambush Yuma, some friendly faces drop in to help take the Barians out!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Fight for a Friend
programme.desc: Quattro faces off against the Barian leader, Nash! Hoping to find Shark swimming just beneath his new Barian identity, Quattro looks to hook his old friend and reel him back in!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Farewell for a Friend
programme.desc: The back and forth battle between Nash and Quattro comes to a climactic conclusion! Will this battle lure the real Shark out from inside his Barian form, or will it cost Quattro much more than he ever could have imagined?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Settling the Score: Part 1
programme.desc: Looking to get revenge for their brother Quattro, Trey and Quinton team up to take down the treacherous Barian, Mizar!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Settling the Score: Part 2
programme.desc: As Quinton and Trey's devastating double duel against Mizar flares to a feverish finish, the brothers reveal the real reason they are battling the Barian! Their startling secret hits Mizar harder than any attack!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Fists of Fury: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma and Astral's race to face Don Thousand is stopped cold by the hot-blooded Alito, now brainwashed by the Barian deity! Can they think fast enough to free Alito of Don Thousand, or will he take the two down for the count?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Fists of Fury: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma and Astral duel desperately to try and turn an old enemy into their newest ally, but with Don Thousand in Alito’s corner, Yuma and Astral find themselves up against the ropes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Power Play
programme.desc: Vector sets his sights on squashing Marin and Dumon, and there’s nothing Shark can do but watch his sister and best friend squirm before his eyes.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Barian vs. Barian
programme.desc: The thunderous battle between Marin, Dumon and Vector shatters expectations as it nears its startling end! Meanwhile, Alito stands tall against his former friend, the Barian behemoth - Girag!

programme.title: Luffy faces those who are infected by the Plague Rounds and the non-infected prisoners who submit to the authority of Udon. To open their eyes, Luffy takes a measure that will risk his life. However, the Chief Warden Babanuki has something up his sleeve.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: We’re Here to Win! Luffy's Desperate Scream!

programme.title: The freed prisoners in Udon refuse to fight alongside Luffy because he is a pirate. Raizo and Old Man Hyo try their best to convince them, but an unexpected person stands up to bring the prisoners hope after taking down Kaido!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Warriors' Dream! Luffy's Conquer of Udon!

programme.title: After standing against Orochi, Zoro and Hiyori are chased by Orochi's ninja group. Meanwhile, Orochi is told that they captured Trafalgar Law as the people of the Flower Capital prepare for the upcoming Fire Festival.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Orochi's Hunting Party! The Ninja Group vs. Zoro!

programme.title: Nami and Franky join Kanjuro who has taken Yasuie's dead body to bury him with Oden, and together they hit the road. Robin, Usopp, and Brook are at the dock trying to figure out a way to pass through a check point.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Tension Rises in Onigashima! Two Emperors of the Sea Meet?!

programme.title: As the clash between Kaido and Big Mom continues, Queen looks for a way to get out of Onigashima. Meanwhile in Udon, Old Man Hyo finds his former allies, four bosses from each region.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Hiyori's Confession! A Reunion at Bandit's Bridge!

programme.title: Zoro runs after the warrior-monk who took his Shusui and Kawamatsu shares with Hiyori his memory of a fox that was guarding the graves in Ringo. As they catch up to Zoro, they find a room filled with swords.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Its Name is Enma! Oden's Great Swords!

programme.title: As the day of the raid approaches, Law finds someone who might help him escape the prison and Kin'emon gathers up most of his main allies to discuss the raid plan. Meanwhile, at Onigashima, Kaido and Big Mom make a stunning declaration!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A New Alliance?! Kaido’s Army Gathers!

programme.title: Kin'emon, Momonosuke, and the others can't fight back tears when they hear that Hiyori is alive. Zoro is stunned by Enma's demonic power and its ties to him.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Ticking Down to the Great Battle! The Straw Hats Go into Combat Mode!

programme.title: The resolution that passed the Reverie and the incidents surrounding the conference stun people all over the world and corner the Seven Warlords of the Sea. Meanwhile, a Navy captain Koby secretly contacts someone who is currently in the Land of Wano.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Big News! An Incident That Will Affect the Seven Warlords!

programme.title: Admiral Issho and Fleet Admiral Sakazuki argue over the abolition of the Seven Warlord system and the alliance of the two Emperors of the Sea. Meanwhile, ex-Fleet Admiral Sengoku teaches the young Navy soldiers about the legendary Rocks Pirates.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Legendary Battle! Garp and Roger!

programme.title: On the day of the Fire Festival, Orochi leaves the mainland of the Land of Wano heading for Onigashima where a big banquet will take place.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Rendezvous Port! The Land of Wano Act Three Begins!

programme.title: The night before the great battle, Orochi orders the destruction of the Sunny along with some bridges across the country to block Akazaya samurai's allies from their rendezvous.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Number-One Samurai in the Land of Wano! Here comes Kozuki Oden!

programme.title: When the angry mountain god, the giant boar, almost kills Kin'emon, Oden steps in. Kin'emon is impressed when he sees Oden's strength and pledges his life to serve him.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Tearfully Swearing Allegiance! Oden and Kin'emon!

programme.title: Oden transforms the wild land of Kuri into a habitable region and is made Daimyo over it. Then he meets Kawamatsu the Kappa and the two Minks, Dogstorm and Cat Viper, who become his followers like the others.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Changing Destiny! The Whitebeard Pirates Cast Ashore!

programme.title: Whitebeard and his crew dock at one of the ports in the Land of Wano with their broken ship and the news excites Oden. He runs to the port and asks Whitebeard to let him get on board the ship but the request is rejected.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Oden's journey finally begins. He is in awe of all the things that he has never seen before. And for the first time in his life, he becomes a wanted person and makes the headlines which catches the eye of a high-profile figure.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Whitebeard's Little Brother! Oden's Great Adventure!

programme.title: In the Land of Wano, the Shogun Sukiyaki falls critically ill and names Orochi proxy Shogun until Oden returns in case he dies.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Roger is amazed when he finds out that Oden can read the script on the Ponegliff since he believes it will guide him to the last, undiscovered island where no man has ever been.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Singing out loud, the Roger Pirates continue on with their journey. They soar up to the island above the clouds and go down into the deep sea to get to the island at the sea bottom.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Oden and the Roger Pirates head for the Land of Wano to obtain a copy of the Road Ponegliff. Oden sees Kin'emon and the others for the first time in years, but he immediately returns to the sea leaving his wife and children behind.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The King of the Pirates is Born! Arriving at the Last Island!

programme.title: After reaching Laugh Tale, Roger declares the disbanding of his pirate group and disembarks first. Oden gets dropped off at the Land of Wano and reunites with his family and retainers.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: To the Land of Wano! The Roger Pirates Disband!

programme.title: Enraged by Orochi's tyrannical acts, Oden raids his castle in the Flower Capital and points his sword at Orochi. However, hours later, people who were waiting for Oden to come out after defeating Orochi see the unexpected.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sad News! The Opening of the Great Pirate Era!

programme.title: Oden keeps dancing naked in the Flower Capital and losing all the trust of the people. One day, Orochi comes to Kuri and reveals his evil plan for the Land of Wano.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Raid! Oden and the Akazaya Nine!

programme.title: Kaido comes to the mainland along with his troops to fight against Oden and the Akazaya samurai who were on their way to raid Kaido's mansion. Even though Oden's group are unprepared and outnumbered, they fight hard to save the future of the Land of Wano.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The End of the Battle! Oden vs. Kaido!

programme.title: Oden and the Akazaya members are sentenced to death by boiling in a pot. Oden asks for a chance to survive which is accepted by Kaido. Then, Oden enters the boiling pot holding his retainers over his head.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Boiled to Death! Oden's One-hour Struggle!

programme.title: As Oden continues trying to survive in the boiling pot holding his retainers over his head, people learn the truth from Shinobu and get shocked. At the same time, Oden tells his retainers the importance of opening the borders of the Land of Wano.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Oden Wouldn't Be Oden If It Wasn't Boiled!

programme.title: As Kin'emon and the others run to Oden Castle to save Oden's family, the castle is set on fire and Kaido attacks Toki and her children.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Castle on Fire! The Fate of the Kozuki Clan!

programme.title: The day of the Fire Festival has finally come and the whole army is now getting ready to head for Onigashima to raid Kaido!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Back to the Present Day! 20 Years Later!

programme.title: The Straw Hats and thousands of allies who were supposed to be there are nowhere to be found, but Kin'emon and the others decide to set sail to the stormy sea in a small boat.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Sea Is For Pirates! Raid! To Onigashima!

programme.title: Luffy, Law, and Kid join the Akazaya samurai and begin to fight Kaido's army. The three rivals from the Worst Generation compete with each other as they attack the enemy fleet with their ultimate skills.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Worst Generation Charges in! The Battle of the Stormy Sea!

programme.title: The Akazaya members are surprised by help from their old mate and Kin'emon notices he made a big mistake which has luckily saved all his allies. As their battle against Kaido's army heats up, the cornered Kanjuro makes a stunning move.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Swept away by Kanjuro, Momonosuke remembers his father, tries to rise above his fear, and speak to his allies. Luffy and the others start heading for Onigashima, but Kaido's army gets in their way again with a formidable weapon.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Tearful Promise! The Kidnapped Momonosuke!

programme.title: Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hat crew are excited to see Jimbei again and welcome him as a new member. Meanwhile, Law and the Akazaya members strategize on how to enter Onigashima and attack Kaido.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A New Member! 'First Son of the Sea' Jimbei!

programme.title: Mimic, (1997, Creature Features)
programme.desc: From Oscar winning director Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER) comes the ultimate battle between man and nature. Once a miracle of genetic engineering, what was created in the lab has evolved to mimic the most dangerous predator of all—humans.

programme.title: Species, (1995, Science fiction)
programme.desc: She's beautiful, seductive, intelligent, and her charms could spell doom for the entire human race! Ben Kingsley, Forrest Whitaker, and Natasha Henstridge star in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi hit.

programme.title: The Relic, (1997, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: Come in—if you dare. The opening-night gala for a new exhibit at Chicago's natural history museum is underway. But be advised: something terrifying wants to make sure no one ever leaves.

programme.desc: After a failed global-warming experiment, a post-apocalyptic Ice Age has killed off nearly all life on the planet.

programme.title: Flame Of Barbary Coast, (1945, Western)
programme.desc: A cowboy competes with a gambling tycoon on the Barbary Coast for the hand of a beautiful dance-hall queen.

programme.title: El Paso, (1949, Western)
programme.desc: A lawyer finds that guns speak louder than words when he rids a Western town of its criminal element.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks, (1961, Western)
programme.desc: After robbing a Mexican bank, Dad Longworth takes the loot and leaves his partner Rio to be captured but Rio escapes and searches for Dad in California.

programme.title: Doc, (1971, Western)
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Ride, Ranger, Ride, (1936, Western)
programme.desc: Former Texas Ranger Gene Autry receives a commission as lieutenant in the U.S. Cavalry and, along with troopers Frog Millhouse and Rufe Jones, reports to Colonel Summeral at Fort Adobe.

programme.title: The Big Show, (1936, Western)
programme.desc: Movie stunt-double Gene Autry must take the place of temperamental Western star Tom Ford at the Texas Centennial. Gene's singing soon leads to complications with girlfriends, studio executives, and gangsters.

programme.title: The Old Corral, (1936, Western)
programme.desc: Nightclub singer Eleanor Spencer flees Chicago after witnessing a murder committed by her boss, gangster Mike Scarlotti. Fearing for her safety, Eleanor heads West and is soon recognized by a crooked saloon owner Martin Simms.

programme.title: The Return Of A Man Called Horse, (1976, Western)
programme.desc: Richard Harris stars in this superior sequel which follows the plight of a horribly wronged tribe of Sioux Indians and the white man who would join in their revenge.

programme.title: Billy Two Hats, (1974, Western)
programme.desc: Archie (Gregory Peck) and his partner, Billy (Desi Arnaz, Jr.) are bandits by trade, staging daring robberies throughout the American frontier. But when their latest heist takes a deadly turn, they are pursued by a ruthless marshal (Jack Warden).

programme.title: Pioneer Woman, (1973, Western)
programme.desc: In this powerful tale of courage, determination, and the pioneering spirit that defined an era, a young woman bravely sets out with her children in tow to claim a homestead - and a brand new life - in the untamed West after her husband is killed.

programme.title: The Longest Yard, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: The story of a pro quarterback and former college champion and coach are asked to put together a football team of inmates to take on the guards while doing their time in prison.

programme.title: Old School, (2003, Comedy)
programme.desc: Three men are disenchanted with life and try to recapture their college days.

programme.title: Orange County, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: Shaun is content to be a bright but unfocused surf slacker, until the day he discovers a novel by acclaimed author Martin Skinner. Inspired, he suddenly leaves behind Orange County to study creative writing Stanford University.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Zirconia threatens the Amazon Trio that if they don’t capture Pegasus by the next new moon, the magic making them human will wear off.
programme.sub-title: Mirrors of Dreams: The Amazon's Last Stage

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends go to see a show at the Dead Moon Circus. But Momo starts acting peculiar and leaves, causing Chibi-Usa to become worried.
programme.sub-title: The Amazoness: Nightmare from Behind the Mirrors

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami falls in love with a melody she finds online. She works on lyrics that match the melody and also goes to meet the composer, Toshiyuki Nishino.
programme.sub-title: True Power Explodes: Ami's Melody of the Heart

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rei becomes famous after posing for a magazine. A girl named Nanako, expresses her desire to study under Rei so that she can become just like her.
programme.sub-title: Flames of Passion: Mars's Raging Super Attack

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Chibi-Usa go to the dentist to get their cavities treated. The dental clinic is actually a trap set up by Palla-Palla to find Pegasus.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako and Makoto compete to win the heart of Honjo, a young principal. But their rivalry starts to put a strain on their friendship.
programme.sub-title: Clash of Dreams: Minako and Makoto's Broken Friendship

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa’s school is having a sports day. However, one of its main events is jumping over the vaulting box, which Chibi-Usa is not very good at.
programme.sub-title: Overcome Your Fear: The Jump to Freedom

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa and Usagi befriend a young painter named Kamoi at the park. Kamoi is visited by Cere-Cere, who asks the man to paint a portrait of her.
programme.sub-title: Don't Lose Sight of Your Dreams: The Mirror of Truth

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa is curious to know why Pegasus is reluctant to tell her where he came from. When she confronts Pegasus with the question, he disappears.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Palla-Pall turns Sailor Chibi Moon into an adult and Sailor Moon into a child. Chibi-Usa turns into shock when Pegasus can no longer hear her.
programme.sub-title: Pegasus's Secret: The Boy Who Protects the Dream World

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls begin to suspect that Chibi-Usa is in love. Eager to know who the boy is, they try to get Chibi-Usa to talk, but with little success.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends help set up the stage for the Coming of Age Day ceremony. They befriend four girls who are actually the Amazoness Quartet.
programme.sub-title: Dream to be an Adult: The Amazoness' Confusion

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Strange spider webs begin to appear all across the Juban District. The girls notice that these webs are all originating from the Dead Moon Circus.
programme.sub-title: Terror in Motion: The Dark Queen's Evil Hand

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nehelenia sets her plan in motion by starting a solar eclipse that will leave the world in eternal darkness.
programme.sub-title: The Source of Darkness: Dead Moon Circus

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Dead Moon discovers that Sailor Chibi Moon was hiding Pegasus and captures her. Sailor Chibi Moon learns the history behind the Dead Moon's queen.
programme.sub-title: Labyrinth of Mirrors: Chibi Moon Captured

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nehelenia demands that Helios give up the Golden Crystal in exchange for Sailor Chibi Moon. The Sailor Guardians are struggling to defeat Zirconia.
programme.sub-title: The Golden Crystal Appears: Nehalennia's Magic

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nehelenia regains her full power and proceeds to put the world into an eternal slumber.Sailor Moon tries to activate the power of the Golden Crystal.
programme.sub-title: When the Crystal Shines: The Beautiful Power of Dreams

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Golden Crystal’s power defeats Nehelenia, pushing her back into the abyss. Nehelenia tries to take Sailor Chibi Moon with her.
programme.sub-title: Dreams Forever: Fill the Heavens with Light

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends start their new lives as high school girls. Nehalennia breaks out of her prison to seek revenge against the Sailor Guardians.
programme.sub-title: The Flower of Nightmares Scatters: The Queen of Darkness Returns

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Hotaru starts to age at an accelerated rate, from a baby to a young girl within days. She warns of coming danger that will soon befall Sailor Moon.
programme.sub-title: Saturn Awakens: The Ten Sailor Guardians Unite

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The city is being plagued by a strange illness that causes people to become obsessed with staring into the mirror for hours, even days.
programme.sub-title: The Cursed Mirror: Mamoru Caught in a Nightmare

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon is left devastated after seeing Mamoru get abducted To make matters worse, Nehalennia’s action is starting to cause a time paradox.
programme.sub-title: Night of Destiny: The Sailor Guardians' Ordeals

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon runs off to save Mamoru from Nehalennia. The rest of the Sailor Guardians try to go after her, but they fall victim to Nehalennia’s traps.
programme.sub-title: For Love: The Endless Battle in the Dark World

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Chibi Moon and Sailor Saturn make it to Nehalennia’s palace, where Mamoru is being held prisoner. The two Guardians are unable to free him.
programme.sub-title: Moon Power of Love: The Nightmare Ends

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Mamoru tells Usagi that he’s accepted an offer to study abroad in the U.S., which will force them to have a long-distance relationship.
programme.sub-title: Farewells and Encounters: The Transitioning Stars of Destiny

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi runs into Seiya and is annoyed by his cocky attitude. The next day, Seiya and the rest of Three Lights have transferred to her school.
programme.sub-title: A School Storm: The Transfer Students Are Idols

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako decides to work for the Three Lights as their personal assistant. But Minako soon realizes that being a star is not all fun and glamor.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Three Lights are rehearsing for their upcoming musical. But they seem to have a hard time winning the approval of the stage director.
programme.sub-title: Fighter's Secret Identity: The Shocking Super Transformation

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami invites Taiki to come and watch the Wataru’s Comet pass by Earth with their science teacher Amanogawa, only to be rejected.
programme.sub-title: A Star of Dreams and Wishes: Taiki's Transformation

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and the girls are searching for Luna, who has gone missing. To their surprise, they find Luna being introduced on TV as Yaten’s pet cat.
programme.sub-title: Luna's Discovery: The Real Face of Yaten

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Taiki asks Makoto to appear on a cooking show with him. Usagi decides to tag along, but her clumsiness creates a huge mess at the TV studio.
programme.sub-title: Friend or Foe? Star Lights and the Sailor Guardians

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and the girls try to buy tickets to a Three Lights concert. Michiru gives them the tickets, revealing that she will be preforming.
programme.sub-title: Calling of the Shining Stars: Enter Haruka and Michiru

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Seiya asks Usagi out on a date, to which she agrees. Sailor Iron Mouse attempts to make up for her recent failures by going after Seiya’s star seed.

programme.title: Divergent, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: In a future society, people are divided into factions based on their personalities. After a young woman (Shailene Woodley) learns she is a Divergent and will never fit into any one group, she uncovers a conspiracy to destroy all those like her.

programme.title: The Divergent Series: Insurgent, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Fugitives Tris and Four search for allies and answers among the ruins of Chicago while arduously trying to evade Jeanine, leader of the Erudite.

programme.title: The Divergent Series: Allegiant, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: As a ruthless battle threatens humanity, Tris and Four journey beyond the wall that encloses Chicago to find a peaceful solution for their embroiled city.

programme.title: The Giver, (1970, Entertainment)

programme.title: O Amante, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. Um homem que, após a morte da sua esposa, descobre que ela tinha um amante há vários anos, embarca numa viagem que o leva a Inglaterra, Alemanha e Itália para encontrar o amante da sua esposa e descobrir toda a verdade sobre aquela mulher. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Liam Neeson, Antonio Banderas, Laura Linney, Romola Garai, Abigail Canton, Pam Ferris, Paterson Joseph, Craig Parkinson, Lola Peploe, Sophie Wu Diretor: Richard Eyre

programme.title: A Vinganca é Minha, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Após o ataque a seu complexo, Kane enterra seus amigos e parte para vingar suas mortes. Monte uma nova equipe e siga o caminho através da fronteira para Vancouver. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, Sarah Lind Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.desc: 2020. O general romano Lucius lidera uma legião de mil soldados no país e com o comandante do protetorado das Regiões Ocidentais, Huo An, ele luta para derrotar o assassino Tiberius e restaurar a soberania da China. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jackie Chan, John Cusack, Adrien Brody Diretor: Daniel Lee

programme.title: História de um Assassinato, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. Vera, uma famosa atriz de Nova York, deixa seu ex-namorado problemático entrar em seu apartamento. Tudo se complica quando ele decide atacá-la. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Sienna Miller, Alec Baldwin Diretor: James Toback

programme.title: Perseguição Mortal, (2022)
programme.desc: 2022. O ladrão realiza o roubo de sua vida quando rouba o traficante psicótico, Temple. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Vinnie Jones, Lina Lecompte, James Clayton Diretor: James Clayton

programme.title: Céu em Chamas, (1997)
programme.desc: 1997. Midori, uma relutante noiva japonesa, forja seu sequestro durante a lua-de-mel em Sidney. Sozinha e desnorteada num país estranho, é feita refém num assalto a banco. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Russell Crowe, Youki Kudoh, Kenji Isomura, Ray Barrett, Robert Mammone, Petru Gheorghiu, Anthony Phelan, Matthew Dyktynski, Colin Hay, Susan Prior Diretor: Craig Lahiff

programme.title: A Colônia, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Em 2018, depois de um desastre pela mudança climática que levou a uma nova idade do gelo, um clandesttino reduto de sobreviventes devem lutar para preservar a humanidade de uma ameaça mais selvagem do que os elementos. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Kevin Zegers, Laurence Fishburne, Bill Paxton, Atticus Mitchell, John Tench, Kimberly-Sue Murray, Lisa Berry, Charlotte Sullivan, Dru Viergever, Lucius Hoyos Diretor: Jeff Renfroe

programme.title: O Lago dos Tubarões, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Meredith Hernandez é uma jovem mãe e agente policial de uma cidade perto do pacífico Lago Tahoe. Quando uma série de ataques de tubarões provocou o pânico na cidade, ela e um perito em tubarões decidiram investigar os estranhos incidentes. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Dolph Lundgren, Danny Roth, Sara Lane Diretor: Jerry Dugan

programme.title: O Jurássico, (2022)
programme.desc: 2022. Uma jovem cientista e sua equipe chegam a uma ilha misteriosa em busca de respostas sobre o que aconteceu com seu pai, que desapareceu lá anos atrás. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Ma Xinyu, Feng Qilong, Yang Qiyu, Shen Yunzhong, Chang Yaona Diretor: Zhao Cong

programme.title: Desastre Solar, (2024)
programme.desc: 2024. Trevor e seu colega cientista Nick descobrem que o sol foi empurrado em direção à Terra, causando todos os tipos de desastres relacionados a incêndios à medida que o planeta começa a esquentar rapidamente! Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Sam Thackwell, Natalie Lauren, Connor Powles, Poppy Castleton Diretor: Ben J. Williams

programme.title: Tempestade de Gelo, (2023)
programme.desc: 2023. Quando uma tempestade de inverno atinge a Carolina do Norte com a menor temperatura já registrada na história, os climatologistas começam uma corrida contra o tempo para salvar o máximo de vidas possíveis antes que o país inteiro vire gelo. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Grant Bowler, Jack Pearson, Jessie B. Evans, Mckenzie Westmore, Mica Javier, Tola Lawal, Tori Griffith, Tyler Christopher, William Baldwin Diretor: Jared Cohn

programme.title: Infectados, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Após perder contato com um grupo de pesquisadores em uma ilha remota, uma corporação militar contrata um grupo de cientistas para descobrir o que deu errado. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Brandon Laatsch, Christina Jones, Eric Raymond Lim, Jeff Castle, Matt Lagan, Michael Cummings, Michelle Ehrman, Tate Ammons, Tess Panzer Diretor: Niko Pueringer, Sam Gorski

programme.title: Tubarões de Gelo, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. Uma nova raça de tubarões vorazes e agressivos racha o fundo do oceano congelado de uma estação de pesquisa do Ártico, devorando todos os que caem. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Kaiwi Lyman, Edward Deruiter, Jenna Parker Diretor: Emile Edwin Smith

programme.title: O Exterminador de Cyborgs, (1995)

Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Don Wilson, Stacie Foster, Tony Burton, John Kassir, Stephen Rowe, Steve Burton, Anthony De Longis, Stephen Quadros, Jim Maniaci, Christopher Boyer Diretor: Richard Pepin

programme.title: A Hospedeira, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Quando um inimigo invisível ameaça a humanidade assumindo seus corpos e apagando suas memórias, Melanie Stryder arrisca tudo para proteger as pessoas com quem se importa. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Saoirse Ronan, Max Irons, Jake Abel Diretor: Andrew Niccol

programme.title: O Último Dia, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. Uma tempestade apocalíptica ameaça devastar um país inteiro. É decretado estado de emergência enquanto o caos estiver instaurado. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Joachim Aeschlimann, Luna Arzoni, Nicolas Bachmann Diretor: Benny Jaberg, Gregor Frei, Lisa Blatter

programme.title: 2:22- Encontro Marcado, (2017)
programme.desc: 2017. A vida de um homem sai dos trilhos quando um padrão ameaçador de eventos se repete exatamente da mesma maneira todos os dias, terminando precisamente às 2:22. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Michiel Huisman, Teresa Palmer, Remy Hii, Simone Kessell, Mitchell Butel, Sam Reid, John Waters, Kerry Armstrong, Richard Davies, Maeve Dermody Diretor: Paul Currie

programme.title: Um Homem de Família, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Jack Campbell é um solteiro convicto que há 13 anos desistiu de um grande amor para se tornar um empresário bem sucedido. Até que na véspera do Natal ele passa por uma experiência traumática e, ao acordar, vê-se numa nova vida. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Nicolas Cage, Téa Leoni, Don Cheadle Diretor: Brett Ratner

programme.title: Procura-se um amigo para o fim do mundo, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. O filme explora o que as pessoas farão em um futuro próximo, nos últimos dias da humanidade. Quando as respectivas jornadas de Dodge (Sr. Carell) e Penny (Srta. Knightley) convergem, suas perspectivas, se não as do mundo, se iluminam. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Steve Carell, Keira Knightly, Adam Brody, Connie Britton Diretor: Lorene Scafaria

programme.title: Um Romance na Alta Moda, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Kate sonha em ser design de moda. Apesar de ser brilhante e talentosa, ninguém deseja contratá-la, pois é difícil confiar nela já que seu pai é Lee Kassell, uma varejista de roupas que são inspiradas nos designers para quem Kate deseja trabalhar. programme.title: O Prazer de sua Companhia, (2006)

programme.title: O Último Guarda-Costas, (2010)

programme.title: Tudo por Justiça, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Russell, um operário da fábrica, tenta proteger seu irmão mais novo, Rodney, de todos os perigos. No entanto, quando este desaparece, Russell decide resolver o problema por conta própria. programme.title: Um Paparazzi Animal, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. A vida da cadelinha Latte é virada de cabeça para baixo quando sua dona, participa de um novo filme no campo. programme.desc: 2016. O Garoto Formiga está muito mais popular. Agora ele tem um novo inimigo muito mais temível, um garoto novo do colégio. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Tyler Hynes, Angela Bassett, Gloria Reuben Diretor: Yves Simoneau

Mas um encontro com Sócrates, um homem que questiona tudo, faz sua visão de mundo mudar completamente. programme.title: A Hora do Acerto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O inspetor de polícia Wing e todo o seu time de policiais se tornam vítimas de uma gangue. Os policiais são brutalmente assassinados e um jovem é designado para ajudá-lo, mas a gangue volta a agir, iniciando uma aventura cheia de ação e vingança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Jovens e Rebeldes, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Como a maioria dos adolescentes, Culain, Enica, Julian e Sego devem lidar com pressões de outros jovens, bullying, problemas com os pais e, claro, amores não correspondidos. Mas eles também vivem sob o domínio opressivo do Império Romano. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Donnie Darko, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Donnie Darko não se dá bem com sua família, seus professores ou seus colegas de classe, mas acaba encontrando uma amiga em Gretchen. Seu outro amigo, porém, não é tão confiável assim: trata-se de Frank, um coelho gigante que só ele pode ver. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Os Intrusos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um grupo de amigos, na década de 1990, acredita ter encontrado o roubo perfeito: uma casa vazia com um cofre cheio de dinheiro. Quando o casal de idosos que ali mora chega mais cedo, a situação se inverte de repente. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Além do Horizonte, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A população da Terra volta a ser aterrorizada por naves alienígenas que emitem luzes azuis e sugam as pessoas. O policial Mark começa uma luta implacável contra esses inimigos quando seu filho é capturado. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Resgate da Princesa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ruslan, um artista sonha em se tornar um cavaleiro, se apaixona por Mila. A felicidade deles não dura muito tempo. Chernomor, o malvado feiticeiro, rouba Mila diante dos olhos de Ruslan para transformar seu poder de amor em seu próprio poder mágico. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Robo-Dog, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O cãozinho de Tyler sofre uma morte trágica, deixando o garoto extremamente entristecido. Usando uma superbateria, Tom, o pai de Tyler, cria um cão-robô para o filho. O problema é que o chefe de Tom está disposto a tudo para obter a superbateria. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Loucas por Amor, Viciadas em Dinheiro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois que seu marido perde o emprego, a dona de casa Bridget é forçada a assumir um trabalho como auxiliar de limpeza na Casa da Moeda em Kansas City, Missouri, e acaba planejando o roubo de uma fortuna em notas gastas destinadas à destruição. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Meu Trabalho É um Parto, (1970)

programme.title: Jack Hunter - T01E01, (2008)
programme.desc: 2008. O jovem arqueólogo Jack Hunter planejou apenas tirar uma foto de uma tabuinha cuneiforme da outrora insuperável metrópole mesopotmiana Ugarit, na atual Síria, mas é pego e tem que roubá-la de um museu particular na França. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Ivan Sergei, Joanne Kelly, Thure Riefenstein Diretor: Terry Cunningham

programme.title: A Recompensa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após passar 12 anos na prisão, o famoso arrombador de cofres Dom Hemingway volta para as ruas de Londres em busca da sua recompensa por ter ficado de boca fechada durante todo esse tempo. Ao lado do amigo Dickie, ele faz uma visita ao chefe do crime. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Ninguém Brinca com Jesus Quintana, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jesus é um cara excêntrico que acaba de sair da prisão e se une a um velho amigo para uma nova empreitada de roubos e aventuras. No caminho, a descontraída Marie forma um triângulo amoroso com a dupla. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Recompensa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após passar 12 anos na prisão, o famoso arrombador de cofres Dom Hemingway volta para as ruas de Londres em busca da sua recompensa por ter ficado de boca fechada durante todo esse tempo. Ao lado do amigo Dickie, ele faz uma visita ao chefe do crime. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: As Origens do Universo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O mundo que nos rodeia contém muitos sistemas complexos que funcionam perfeitamente juntos. Durante muitos anos, houve um debate acalorado entre evolução e criação, com a questão central de tudo: a Terra foi criada ou surgiu por conta própria. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Forasteiros Malditos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um açougueiro tímido e sua irmã gêmea se aventuram na Austrália em busca de sua mãe biológica. Mas os habitantes aparentemente tolerantes de sua cidade natal escondem um segredo sombrio. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Rodrigo e Matilda têm sua noite de amor perfeita; Stefi aproveita que Brela saiu para ligar para Gerardo e levá-lo para seu quarto, onde fazem amor. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Marco Aurélio e Alejandro continuam tramando um plano de vingança contra Francisco Aristigueta pelo que ele fez com Brela e Georgina. Francisco fica animado para fazer negócios com eles. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Pilar continua furiosa após flagrar Juan Ramón e Michelle se beijando no escritório. Depois de expulsá-lo de casa, ela vai conversar com Michelle. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após flagrar o beijo entre Juan Ramón e Michelle, Pilar entra em depressão, para de se arrumar e passa o tempo chorando. Juan Ramón a encontra nesse estado. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Estefanía faz o teste de gravidez, mas não tem coragem de ver o resultado. Ela entrega o exame para Maca, que dá a notícia de que ela está grávida. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Pilar e Michelle conversam, e Michelle promete se afastar para sempre. Enquanto isso, Rodrigo pede Matilda em casamento e lhe entrega o anel de noivado. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Francisco pressiona Bela para saber se Gerardo é seu filho, já que eles tiveram um caso há 22 anos e ele sumiu ao saber da gravidez. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Entre o Amor e a Fama, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma estrela de reality show sai de Hollywood e parte em direção a Amish Country, onde ela deve decidir entre viver sua nova realidade ou voltar para a antiga. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Um Encontro com o Destino, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Margaret dirige uma agência de arquitetos em pleno crescimento. Ela recebe subitamente duas notícias: sua prima e grande amiga Susan morreu em um acidente de carro com o marido. No testamento, Susan e Hank deixam a guarda para ela. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Paixão Fatal, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um professor universitário alcoólatra em recuperação, tentando recompor sua vida, conhece uma nova aluna sedutora. Ela oferece a ele uma fuga sensual da realidade até que ele perceba que ela pode estar louca. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Apenas por uma Noite, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mulher casada vive uma vida perfeita, até precisar lidar com a traição de sua irmã, que droga seu marido e dorme com ele. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Lora, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma jovem perde seu noivo durante um trágico acidente de moto, e três anos mais tarde se apaixona por seu irmão mais novo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor, Felicidade ou Casamento, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma terapeuta de casais descobre que seus pais estão se divorciando e tenta salvar o casamento deles. Ao se dar conta de que seus esforços não estão adiantando, ela começa a questionar o próprio casamento e sua profissão. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Espírito de Família, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um escritor precisa enfrentar a morte repentina de seu pai, mas, após o enterro, o espírito do falecido aparece para o filho. O rapaz tem que aprender a conviver com essa inusitada e complicada companhia, já que é o único que pode vê-lo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Acima das Nuvens, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Há 20 anos, Maria ficou famosa por sua interpretação no teatro. Agora, ela tem que enfrentar que uma jovem estrela de Hollywood irá interpretar o mesmo papel. Além disso, ela é convidada a dividir o palco com a novata, mas em outro papel. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Life - Um Retrato de James Dean, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1955, o fotógrafo Dennis Stock acompanha James Dean em uma viagem para a fazenda da família do ator. No local, Stock registra as imagens mais famosas de toda a carreira de Dean. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A História de Esau, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois de anos ausente, escritor retorna à casa da família em Israel para cuidar do pai doente. Lá ele enfrenta seu irmão mais novo amargurado, que assumiu toda a responsabilidade pela padaria da família e se casou com a mulher a quem ambos amavam. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Apex, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Cinco caçadores pagam para caçar um homem em uma ilha deserta, e acabam se tornando a presa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Radicão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Tommy vem de uma família de skatistas, mas nunca conseguiu aprender a se equilibrar nas rodas. Quando um valentão da cidade o desafia para uma competição, a única esperança do adolescente é obter ajuda de seu cachorro skatista. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Relógio Encantado, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angel é uma garota tímida que odeia dizer não. Ela encontra um relógio mágico que realiza desejos e a torna incrivelmente popular. Mas essa nova vida talvez não a deixe realmente feliz. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Onde Fica o Paraíso, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Durante a II Guerra Mundial, uma pesquisadora durona e solitária abriga um menino fugindo dos bombardeios em Londres. Aos poucos, ela acaba por abrir seu coração em uma emocionante jornada de amizade e imaginação. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Com Amor, Van Gogh, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um ano após o suicídio de Vincent Van Gogh, Armand Roulin parte para a cidade francesa de Arles e, junto às pessoas que conheceram Vincent, inicia uma investigação no intuito de decifrar se o artista realmente se matou. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Minha Vida de Cachorro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Nos anos 1950, Ingemar é enviado para parentes no interior da Suécia devido à doença de sua mãe. Inicialmente com dificuldades de adaptação e saudades da família, ele acaba vivendo experiências marcantes para toda sua vida. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Delicadeza do Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma bela jovem perde o marido em um terrível acidente. Inconsolável, ela decide mergulhar de cabeça no trabalho, se dedicando de forma integral. No entanto, um beijo sem motivo aparente em um colega muda essa situação. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Uma História Americana, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A violência do preconceito racial causa um boicote aos transportes por parte da comunidade negra nos anos 1950. Uma aristocrata decide, por conveniência, ajudar sua empregada, mas seu marido a proíbe. Essa imposição faz com que as duas se unam. Gêneros: Drama

Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Vagner Fagundes, Diego Lima, Robson Kumode, Diego Marques, Úrsula Bezerra, Lucas Gama, Luiza Porto, Mariana Zink Diretor: Hiroyuki Yamashita

programme.title: Naruto: O Treinamento Continua: Estoure O Balão Da Água! - T01E87
programme.sub-title: O Treinamento Continua: Estoure O Balão Da Água!
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto finalmente começa o treinamento com Jiraiya. A técnica que ele aprende é a marca do Quarto Hokage, um gênio que levou três anos para realmente controlá-la. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Ponto Focal: A Marca Da Folha! - T01E88
programme.sub-title: Ponto Focal: A Marca Da Folha!
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto termina o primeiro passo do treinamento. Mas o próximo passo, fazer com que uma bola de borracha se exploda com chacra, torna-se ser extremamente difícil. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Uma Escolha Impossível: A Dor Dentro Do Coração De Tsunade - T01E89
programme.sub-title: Uma Escolha Impossível: A Dor Dentro Do Coração De Tsunade
programme.desc: 2020. Orochimaru e Kabuto aparecem de repente diante de Tsunade e Shizune que estavam passeando. Orochimaru, ferido pelo Selo Ceifeiro da Morte do Terceiro Hokage, procura por assistência médica do prévio Sannin. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Imperdoável!Uma Total Falta De Respeito! - T01E90
programme.desc: 2020. Para curar seus braços, Orochimaru oferece trazer de volta à vida o irmão mais novo de Tsunade e Dan, o amor dela. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Algo Importante... - T01E49
programme.desc: 2008. A luta entre avó e neto começa. Para derrotar o verdadeiro Sasori dentro do boneco, Hiruko deve ser destruído primeiro. Só a própria avó consegue entender as armadilhas complexas de Sasori, mas é Sakura que deve dar o golpe final. Que estratégia usarão? Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A História Do Álbum Ilustrado - T01E50
programme.desc: 2008. Chiyo e Sakura expõem Sasori, que não envelheceu nada nos últimos vinte anos. Chiyo fica mais chocada com o segundo boneco que Sasori revela. Sasori foi quem planejou o desaparecimento do kazecage. Uma equipe ninja se dirige a um certo local. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Reencontro - T01E51
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura fica cercada por uma nuvem de veneno e usa um papel bomba para se livrar da fumaça. Ela tenta capturar Sasori para forçá-lo a dar informações sobre Orochimaru, invocando dois bonecos para esta batalha. Naruto e Kakashi ainda perseguem Deidara! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.sub-title: Um Cão de x Guarda x Perigoso

programme.sub-title: O Dever x da x Guarda

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T01E07
