programme.title: Pluto TV Anime Ação
programme.desc: 2026. no info available Gêneros: no info available

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Uma Ameaça Se Aproxima - T02E72
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto, mesmo transformado, não desiste de trazer Sasuke para casa. Sakura é ferida por Naruto, mas consegue usar seu ninjutsu para conter a agitação da Raposa de Nove Caudas. Orochimaru tenta deixar o campo de batalha, mas é confrontado por Sai. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Invasão Da Akatsuki - T02E73
programme.desc: 2008. Orochimaru aceita levar Sai para o esconderijo. Yamato consegue parar a agitação de Naruto, mas os ferimentos de Naruto são graves. Quando ele volta a si, Yamato revela a ele e Sakura que Sai foi embora e que Danzo pode estar conspirando algo terrível. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Sob O Céu Estrelado - T02E74
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto e sakura ficam chocados quando descobrem que Danzo planeja trabalhar com Orochimaru. A equipe Dakashi é forçada a fazer uma pausa. Orochimaru percebe que está sendo seguido pelo clone de Yamato e decide usar Sai para despistar seus perseguidores. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Oração Do Velho Monge - T02E75
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto fica chocado ao saber que foi o responsável pelos ferimentos de Sakura. Yamato diz que ele irá suprimir o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas com seu ninjutsu. Sakura pergunta sobre uma história estranha que ela viu no livro de desenhos de Sai. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Próximo Passo - T02E76
programme.desc: 2008. Sai estremece quando encontra Sasuke no esconderijo de Orochimaru. Sai ficará com Orochimaru em troca de algumas informações valiosas, mas ficará sob prisão domiciliar até que possa ser de confiança. Quando fica sozinho, sai e começa a procurar um livro. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Escalada De Prata - T02E77
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi consegue achar Sai. Eles começam a interrogá-lo sobre os planos de Danzo, e Sai conta tudo. Sakura descobre, através das atitudes de Sai, alguns pontos fortes em seu subconsciente e assinala para Sai as contradições em seu comportamento. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Julgamento - T02E78
programme.desc: 2008. Kabuto faz um ataque de surpresa na equipe Kakashi para levar Sai de volta. Com as informações que conseguem através de Kabuto, capturado, a procura por Sasuke está perto do fim. Naruto e Sakura correm para achar Sasuke. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Un Grito Interrompido - T02E79
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto procura por Sasuke. Sai lembra que teve um irmão mais velho e consegue terminar o retrato inacabado. Antes de desaparecer após um ataque de Orochimaru, Sai promete que salvará Sasuke. Yamato descobre uma verdade entre os pertences de Sai. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Últimas Palavras - T02E80
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi fica chocada ao saber que a missão verdadeira de Sai é matar Sasuke. Sai alcança Sasuke - deve matá-lo ou salvá-lo? Sai e Sasuke se enfrentam, demolindo uma parte do esconderijo. Naruto e os outros encontram Sasuke. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Notícias Tristes - T02E81
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi tem seu desejo atendido ao reencontrar Sasuke, mas Sasuke não mudou. Seu objetivo é se vingar de seu irmão mais velho, Itachi. Os impulsos da Raposa de Nove Caudas incitam Naruto, mas Sasuke usa seu sharingan para suprimir a raposa. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Equipe Dez - T02E82
programme.desc: 2008. O desejo de Sasuke por vingança continua firme. Naruto fica chateado quando percebe que fracassou mais uma vez em levar Sasuke para casa. Orochimaru tem mais ou menos seis meses até sua transferência. A equipe Kakashi faz uma nova promessa. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Alvo Na Mira! - T02E83
programme.desc: 2008. Kakashi e a equipe dez partem para deter o akatsuki. Tsunade considera a equipe dez de naruto com o respaldo ideal para a equipe dez e manda naruto aperfeiçoar seu novo jutsu em 24 horas. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Habilidades De Kakuzu - T02E84
programme.desc: 2008. Shikamaru e choji dão os primeiros golpes na batalha, mas estão contrariados com o poder de kakuzu. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Terrível Segredo - T02E85
programme.desc: 2008. Shikamaru e seus companheiros desesperadamente contra-atacam a ofensiva do jutsu de fogo. Mas usar continuamente rasengan e a espada relâmpago causa desgaste em kakashi. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Gênio Shikamaru - T02E86
programme.desc: 2008. Shikamaru enfrenta hidan sozinho, no fundo da floresta e após gastar todo seu chakra, ele tem um ferimento profundo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Quando Se Amaldiçoa Alguém, Cava-Se O Próprio Túmulo! - T02E87
programme.sub-title: Quando Se Amaldiçoa Alguém, Cava-Se O Próprio Túmulo!
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto e a equipe kakashi chegam na hora certa para ajudar a equipe asuma. Sakura e sai receberam ordens de kakashi para ajudar shikamaru, que está lutando sozinho Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Estilo Vento: Rasen Shuriken! - T02E88
programme.desc: 2008. Ino e choji ficam pasmos com novo jutsu de naruto, e kakuzu sente o perigo se aproximando. Mas ao lançá-lo, o novo jutsu se dissipa antes de atingir kakuzu. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Preço Do Poder - T02E89
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto usa seu novo jutsu para derrotar kakuzu. Tsunade dá boas-vindas na volta das equipes ao lar e manda que as equipes asuma e yamato façam uma pausa Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Determinação Do Shinobi - T02E90
programme.desc: 2008. programme.title: 2018. O show do Hyde continua enquanto Aiger finalmente consegue sua tão esperada revanche. programme.title: 2001. Tyson Granger percebe que está atrasado para uma batalha de Beyblade com Andrew, o melhor Beyblader da cidade. Antes que Tyson chegue lá, um Blade Shark chamado Carlos luta e o derrota, pegando sua lâmina. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Toshifumi Kawase
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E01

programme.title: 2001. Tyson rapidamente perde sua batalha com Kai. Andrew e Kenny informam que os Blade Sharks estão procurando o melhor Bit Beast que ninguém pode vencer. Andrew, Kenny e Tyson reconstroem o Bey de Tyson. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Toshifumi Kawase
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E02

programme.title: 2001. Tyson e Kenny conhecem Max, o garoto novo da cidade, pouco antes de um filhote ser levado para uma cachoeira. Tyson tenta salvá-lo, mas falha. Max então tenta e consegue. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Toshifumi Kawase
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E03

programme.title: 2001. O torneio regional de qualificação da Beyblade começa quando Tyson, Max e até Kenny entram para ver se conseguem destronar Kai, o atual campeão. Max ganha seu bloco e avança para a final. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Toshifumi Kawase
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E04

programme.title: 2001. Nas semifinais, Max enfrenta Kai, o campeão. Tyson espera lutar com Ray, um invicto Blader. O prato é baseado como uma torre, para ficar no topo por 10 segundos é como você ganha. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Toshifumi Kawase
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E05

programme.title: 2001. A batalha final das semifinais é Tyson contra Ray, um invicto Blader. Kenny está trabalhando em algo e não está lá na primeira rodada. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Toshifumi Kawase
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E06

programme.title: 2001. Tyson, Max e Kenny estão trabalhando em Dragoon para garantir a vitória nas finais quando o vovô interrompe e revela a Tyson que é seu 13º aniversário! Após a festa, a primeira rodada termina rapidamente, com Tyson derrotando Kai inesperadamente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Toshifumi Kawase

programme.desc: JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Small Things Like These
programme.desc: In 1985 coal merchant Bill Furlong uncovers disturbing secrets in a small Irish town thats controlled by the Roman Catholic Church. Starring Cillian Murphy, Eileen Walsh, Michelle Fairley.

programme.title: Awakenings
programme.desc: A doctor (Robin Williams) tries the drug L-dopa on an immobile man (Robert De Niro) and others like him in 1969 New York. Starring Robert De Niro, Robin Williams, Julie Kavner.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Renee risks everything to change her world around; Alan sets a trap that covers the entire Cape.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: The whole Great White operation is exposed, but some mysteries remain; Ray has a complicated ending; Jackie goes from feeling like a hero after an important discovery to the zero who let something critical get away.

programme.title: Edge of Winter
programme.desc: Stranded at a remote cabin in the wintertime, two siblings (Tom Holland, Percy Hynes White) must fight for survival as their increasingly unhinged father (Joel Kinnaman) loses his grip on reality. Starring Joel Kinnaman, Tom Holland, Percy Hynes White.

programme.title: Rebelle
programme.desc: African rebels force a village girl (Rachel Mwanza) to kill her own parents and join their army, but a miraculous event makes the rebels think she has supernatural powers. Starring Rachel Mwanza, Alain Bastien, Serge Kanyinda.

programme.title: The Journals of Knud Rasmussen
programme.desc: European explorers change the lives of an Inuit community while exploring the Arctic in 1922. Starring Leah Angutimarik, Natar Ungalaaq, Peter-Henry Arnatsiaq.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus, Will and their colleague Allison Grant are stranded when their plane goes down in a desolate mountain range; while anxiously waiting for a rescue team, the passengers fall victim to a series of deadly attacks and vivid nightmares.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: When a mating pair of abnormals is brought in for scientific study, the team begins to exhibit attractions for each other.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: A wildly imaginative 7-year-old discovers that his new brother, Boss Baby, is actually a spy on a secret mission, and only he can help thwart a dastardly plot that involves an epic battle between puppies and babies. Starring Alec Baldwin, Miles Christopher Bakshi, Tobey Maguire.

programme.title: Muppets From Space
programme.desc: After learning about his origins, Gonzo must decide whether to seek his own kind or stay with friends. Starring Jeffrey Tambor, F. Murray Abraham, Rob Schneider.

programme.title: Passport to Paris
programme.desc: Eager to see Paris but tired of their chaperon, identical twins (Ashley Olsen, Mary-Kate Olsen) tour France with two French teenagers. Starring Ashley Olsen, Mary-Kate Olsen, Peter White.

programme.title: Nelly and Simon: Mission Yeti
programme.desc: A private eye and a university research assistant search for the abominable snowman in the Himalayas. Starring Sylvie Moreau, Guillaume Lemay-Thivierge, Rachid Badouri.

programme.title: What a Girl Wants
programme.desc: A vivacious teenager (Amanda Bynes) leaves New York in order to meet her estranged father (Colin Firth) in London. Starring Amanda Bynes, Colin Firth, Kelly Preston.

programme.title: My Girl
programme.desc: An 11-year-old (Anna Chlumsky) meets a boy (Macaulay Culkin) and grows up at her widowed fathers (Dan Aykroyd) funeral home in the summer of 72. Starring Anna Chlumsky, Macaulay Culkin, Dan Aykroyd.

programme.title: Hairspray
programme.desc: In the 1960s Baltimore a plump teen becomes an overnight celebrity after she wins a spot on a local dance program called "The Corny Collins Show." Starring John Travolta, Nikki Blonsky, Amanda Bynes.

programme.title: Dirty Dancing
programme.desc: A doctors (Jerry Orbach) teenage daughter (Jennifer Grey) gets slinky with the dance teacher (Patrick Swayze) at a Catskills resort in the summer of 1963. Starring Jennifer Grey, Patrick Swayze, Jerry Orbach.

programme.title: The Blue Lagoon
programme.desc: A boy (Christopher Atkins), a girl (Brooke Shields) and a burly cook (Leo McKern) are shipwrecked on a Fiji island, where the boy and girl grow up as lovers. Starring Brooke Shields, Christopher Atkins, Leo McKern.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: State cop Jackie Quiñones is back to her wild partying ways; Ray Abruzzi is top cop after taking down the New York connection; imprisoned Frankie Cuevas secures a new partner on the outside.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Jackie fails a pee test and she is off the force, and it wasnt even her pee; Renee unwittingly lets Frankie back into her life, and Osito defends his turf.

programme.title: French Exit
programme.desc: A widowed New York socialite and her aimless son move to Paris after she spends the last of her husbands inheritance. Starring Michelle Pfeiffer, Lucas Hedges, Tracy Letts.

programme.title: Blood Quantum
programme.desc: The dead are coming back to life and almost all of Earths population are decimated due to a zombie virus, except for the isolated Mikmaq reserve of Red Crow, whose indigenous inhabitants are strangely immune to the zombie plague. Starring Michael Greyeyes, Elle-Maija Tailfeathers, Forrest Goodluck.

programme.title: Run This Town
programme.desc: A journalist and a political aide become entangled in a larger-than-life scandal. Starring Ben Platt, Mena Massoud, Nina Dobrev.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Magnus travels to Rome to lead a covert meeting on abnormals; the Cabal seeks revenge for the release of the three witches from Scotland.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A young artist with the ability to draw detailed pictures from memory may be the key to solving a case surrounding the suspicious death of his abusive father.

programme.title: Fly Away Home
programme.desc: A Canadian sculptor (Jeff Daniels) builds an ultralight plane so his teen daughter (Anna Paquin) can lead geese south. Starring Jeff Daniels, Anna Paquin, Dana Delany.

programme.title: Still Mine
programme.desc: A farmer fights back when local authorities hamper his efforts to build a cottage for his dementia-stricken wife. Starring James Cromwell, Geneviève Bujold, Campbell Scott.

programme.title: Goose!

programme.title: Raise Your Voice

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Suitors romance, then abandon, sisters (Emma Thompson, Kate Winslet) left destitute by their fathers death in late-1800s England. Starring Emma Thompson, Alan Rickman, Kate Winslet.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Though broke and lovelorn, a woman (Kristen Wiig) takes on the strange and expensive rituals associated with being her best friends maid of honor. Starring Kristen Wiig, Maya Rudolph, Rose Byrne.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Tempers boil over, and Ray and Alan explode at each other; Frankie learns valuable intel about Osito; Jackie learns there are even more missing or murdered prostitutes.

programme.title: Hightown

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Shane has a new partner; Frankie has intel for Alan on Jorges murder; Ray and Renees relationship hits rock bottom and Jackie completes rehab - no more rogue hero BS.

programme.title: The Sweet Hereafter
programme.desc: A lawyer (Ian Holm) seeks input from parents who lost children in a Canadian bus crash that claimed 14 lives. Starring Ian Holm, Sarah Polley, Bruce Greenwood.

programme.title: Cafe de Flore
programme.desc: Parallel stories revolve around a present-day disc jockey (Kevin Parent) and a single mother (Vanessa Paradis) in the 1960s. Starring Vanessa Paradis, Kevin Parent, Helène Florent.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Magnus and Will investigate a distressing call for help deep below the Bermuda Triangle resulting in a deadly battle to save Magnuss life.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of an old college friend, Will finds himself caught in an underground fight club.

programme.title: Open Season
programme.desc: Stranded in the wilderness, a mule deer (Ashton Kutcher) and a domesticated bear (Martin Lawrence) try to make their way back to the safety of a town preserve before a hunter catches them. Starring Martin Lawrence, Ashton Kutcher, Gary Sinise.

programme.title: Curious George

programme.title: One Week

programme.title: Perfect High

programme.title: Score: A Hockey Musical
programme.desc: A teenage hockey player becomes a national sensation. Starring Brandon Firla, Nelly Furtado, Marc Jordan.

programme.title: Manufactured Landscapes

programme.title: Selena

programme.title: Hightown

programme.title: At First Light
programme.desc: A close encounter with mysterious lights sends two teens on the run after one discovers she has extraordinary but dangerous powers. Starring Stefanie Scott, Theodore Pellerin, Said Taghmaoui.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other mans private affairs. Starring Jake Gyllenhaal, Melanie Laurent, Isabella Rossellini.

programme.title: Annie Get Your Gun

programme.title: Man of La Mancha

programme.title: The Old Man and the Sea

programme.desc: Eric-the-clowns re-entry proves tricky for him and his understudy; a mandatory fitness evaluation sparks a friendly competition; and Stage sisters Zore and Sarah perfect their new trick.

programme.title: Smart Home Killer
programme.desc: A single mother moves into a state-of-the-art smart house, complete with an in-home security system. However, as strange glitches and stranger events start to occur, she soon realizes that shes not the only one watching through her security cameras. Starring Natalie Brown, Anwen ODriscoll, Athena Park.

programme.title: How Not to Hire a Hitman
programme.desc: New couple Leon and Valerie have one unfortunate thing in common, they both hate their exes. When Leons ex-wife and Valeries ex-husband are targeted for murder, it becomes a case of he said/she said. Who hired a hitman?

programme.title: Emily
programme.desc: Emily Brontë struggles within the confines of her life, yearning for artistic and personal freedom. She finds romance before writing her seminal novel, "Wuthering Heights." Starring Emma Mackey, Fionn Whitehead, Oliver Jackson-Cohen.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Tina and Michael Careccia vanish from their Arizona home, sparking a desperate search; a discovery in the backyard reveals their fate; as investigators unraveled the case, details of that fateful night emerge, leading to justice.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Trinity University cheerleader Cayley Mandadi was found unresponsive after a road trip turned deadly; as investigators uncovered troubling details about her final hours, her family fought for justice, ensuring her legacy would lead to change.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: In 1999, Jacksonville store owner Saad Kawaf is attacked in his driveway, leading to a murder and robbery; his wife survives, bound and terrorized; the case goes cold for two decades until DNA technology exposes suspects.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Just outside Athens, Wis., Kenneth Kunz finds four of his family members murdered and one missing; investigators determine whether it was his mother, a local farm boy, or the rumored family drug dealing connections that led to the brutal slayings.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: The chief of police in Sparta, Mich., leads an investigation into what happened to his family friend and babysitter, who is reported missing when she doesnt come home from Christmas shopping, and is found beneath a snow bank weeks later.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: James Lally admits that he has killed his partner Suzanne LaPierre; it takes more than confession for police to locate her body, leading authorities to a long interrogation with a character who seems more concerned with his own comfort.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: A messy divorce leads to a woman hiding a large sum of money with one of her close friends; when the woman goes missing, her friend, Ashley, is believed to be involved in more than just attempted fraud.

programme.title: Happy Clothes: A Film About Patricia Field
programme.desc: Showcases the life, work and legacy of Patricia Field, an Emmy Award-winning costume designer behind "Sex and the City," "Emily in Paris" and "The Devil Wears Prada."

programme.title: Desire: A Temptations Story
programme.desc: Caught up in a whirlwind romance, inspirational talk-show host Kendra spontaneously marries the man of her dreams. However, once the honeymoon is over, revelations about her new husbands past lead her down a dangerous road. Starring Tasha Smith, Adrian Holmes, Millan Tesfazgi.

programme.title: Barber
programme.desc: A wealthy widow hires private investigator Val Barber to find her missing granddaughter. As dark secrets start to surface, Barber finds himself entangled with shady and powerful men who are determind to thwart his investigation. Starring Aidan Gillen, Aisling Kearns, Gary Lydon.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A family of four takes a cruise of a lifetime, but only three return home; their desperate search for their missing adult daughter begins, with all signs pointing to a kidnapping.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A scratch and win ticket unveils an all-expense paid cruise for a young couple; but their luck runs out once aboard the ship as one of them ends up murdered.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: In this case, Tiara Pool, a 21-year-old Navy wife from Jacksonville, Florida, meets David Sparre on Craigslist; their encounter takes a horrific turn when Sparre brutally stabs Tiara 89 times in her apartment in July 2010.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Heather Strubes life takes a tragic turn during a bitter custody battle with her ex-husband, Steven Strube; as she goes to a Target parking lot for a custody exchange of their son, Carson, she is brutally shot in front of Carson.

programme.title: T.I.M.
programme.desc: Prosthetics engineer Abi works on her companys latest product, an AI humanoid called T.I.M. thats designed to serve man; things soon take a turn for the worse when T.I.M. starts to develop a dangerous obsession with her. Starring Georgina Campbell, Eamon Farren, Mark Rowley.

programme.desc: Recovering drug addict Ashley Smith (Kate Mara) reads Rick Warrens "The Purpose Driven Life" as armed fugitive Brian Nichols (David Oyelowo) holds her hostage in her apartment.

programme.desc: Taking refuge in a womans home, a DEA agent must protect a federal witnesss family from vicious cartel gunmen.

programme.title: Rumours (2024)

programme.desc: Serving a life sentence alone on a distant planet, an aging convict must confront his past when a new prisoner arrives and forces him to remember his life on Earth.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick (2022)

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)

programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Good Kill (2014)
programme.desc: An Air Force drone pilot (Ethan Hawke) begins to question the ethics of dropping bombs on Afghanistan from the safety of his post in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Vicious (2025)
programme.desc: A strange ritual soon unravels into a waking nightmare when a woman receives a mysterious box that comes with instructions to place three things inside: something you need, something you hate, and something you love.

programme.title: The Return (2024)
programme.desc: After 20 years away, Odysseus washes up on the shores of Ithaca. The king finds much has changed since he left to fight in the Trojan War. No longer the mighty warrior his people remember, Odysseus must face his past to save his family.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity (2007)

programme.title: The Peacemaker (1997)
programme.desc: A scientist (Nicole Kidman) and an Army Special Forces colonel (George Clooney) travel the globe in pursuit of stolen nuclear weapons.

programme.title: Babel (2006)

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)
